questionHtml:
The mass of a nucleus of iron-56 (Fe2656) is M.

What is the mass defect of the nucleus of iron-56?

 

A.  M − 26mp − 56mn

B.  26mp + 30mn − M

C.  M − 26mp − 56mn − 26me

D.  26mp + 30mn + 26me − M

meta.title: The mass of a nucleus of iron-56 (Fe2656) is M. What is the mass defect of the nucleus of iron-56? A. M − 26mp − 56mn B. 26mp + 30mn − M C. M − 26mp − 56mn − 26me D. 26mp + 30mn +
